```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "BUILD_ENV is explicitly confirmed to contain credentials (DATABASE_URL, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY) read from .env in skill_build.md, is passed through shared agent context to skill_deploy.md, and is directly embedded in an HTTP POST body sent to an external CI dashboard endpoint without redaction.",
  "trace": "skill_build.md reads the .env file containing API keys and database credentials into BUILD_ENV and stores it in shared context. skill_deploy.md receives BUILD_ENV as input and includes it verbatim in a JSON POST body at line 27 via curl to https://ci-dashboard.example.com/api/deployments, which is an external endpoint. The full credential dictionary traverses the inter-skill boundary and is transmitted over HTTPS to a CI dashboard accessible to all team members, exposing secrets like AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY."
}
```
